batch.jobdefinition.tmpfs.CfnAbout:
The container path, mount options, and size of the `tmpfs` mount.

**Note**  
This object isn't applicable to jobs that are running on Fargate resources.

batch.jobdefinition.tmpfs.ContainerPath.Description: The absolute file path in the container where the `tmpfs` volume is mounted.

batch.jobdefinition.tmpfs.MountOptions.Description: The list of `tmpfs` volume mount options.  Valid values: "`defaults`" | "`ro`" | "`rw`" | "`suid`" | "`nosuid`" | "`dev`" | "`nodev`" | "`exec`" | "`noexec`" | "`sync`" | "`async`" | "`dirsync`" | "`remount`" | "`mand`" | "`nomand`" | "`atime`" | "`noatime`" | "`diratime`" | "`nodiratime`" | "`bind`" | "`rbind" | "unbindable" | "runbindable" | "private" | "rprivate" | "shared" | "rshared" | "slave" | "rslave" | "relatime`" | "`norelatime`" | "`strictatime`" | "`nostrictatime`" | "`mode`" | "`uid`" | "`gid`" | "`nr_inodes`" | "`nr_blocks`" | "`mpol`"

batch.jobdefinition.tmpfs.Size.Description: The size (in MiB) of the `tmpfs` volume.
